---
title: "Yifei Yuan"
description-meta: "Academic Website Adapted from Quarto Academic Website Template"
image: "files/images/profilephoto.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: 1155173921@link.cuhk.edu.hk    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
      href: https://www.webofscience.com  
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
      href: https://www.scopus.com
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a Master student in Geography at [The Chinese University of Hong Kong](https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/chinese/index.html), supervised by [Prof. Harry Lee](https://www.grm.cuhk.edu.hk/en/profile/hflee/).

My research interests center on the intersection of environmental economics, sustainability assessment, and geospatial technology. My current research focuses on the following themes:

- Remote sensing applications in social computing
- Global-scale assessment of next-generation photovoltaic development
- Life cycle assessment modeling for sustainability analysis


## Education

- MPhil in Geography and Resource Management, *CUHK*
- BSSc in Economics (First Class Honour), *CUHK*
- Semaster exchange, *U of Geneva*

## Experience

- Research Assistant, SIAT, Chinese Academy of Sciences
- Research Assistant, CUHK Business School
- Business Analyst, Bytedance

## Awards & Honours

- Full Tuition Scholarship & Honours
- HKSAR Government Scholarship 2022/23
- HKSAR Government Scholarship 2023/24
- Yasumoto International Exchange Scholarship
- S.H. Ho Foundation Scholarship
- S.H. Ho College Advanced Scholarship
- Dean's List Award
- Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation Scholarship
- S.H. Ho College Matriculation Scholarships for Academic Excellence


:::


<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent News

-   \[06/2026\] My paper "Solar poverty alleviation program raises local incomes and lowers air pollution in rural China." is selected as **Featured Article** by *Communications Sustainability* \[[Link](https://www.nature.com/articles/s44458-026-00091-1)\] 🎉🎉🎉

-   \[05/2026\] My undergraduate thesis is accepted by *Communications Sustainability*: "Solar poverty alleviation program raises local incomes and lowers air pollution in rural China." \[[Link](https://www.nature.com/articles/s44458-026-00091-1)\]

-   \[05/2026\] I have accepted the MPhil offer from CUHK GRMD and will work with Prof. Harry Lee in the following 2 years. 

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
